basic_details.job_title: IIT Mandi Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Mandi (IIT Mandi)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Mandi (IIT Mandi) Project Associate - I Notification 2026 has been released on 13 May 2026 on the official website of IIT Mandi. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Mandi Recruitment 2026 for the post of Project Associate - I.

qualification.education_qualification: B. Tech / M. Sc. / M. A. or equivalent degree in Civil Engineering / Environmental Engineering / Environmental Science / Geography / Earth Sciences / Water Resources / Sociology / Urban Planning or related disciplines.
qualification.details: B. Tech / M. Sc. / M. A. or equivalent degree in Civil Engineering / Environmental Engineering / Environmental Science / Geography / Earth Sciences / Water Resources / Sociology / Urban Planning or related disciplines. Willingness to conduct extensive fieldwork in urban and peri-urban Himalayan regions. Ability to comprehend and comply with research protocols developed by the lead investigators. Good oral and written communication and documentation skills. Strong ability to work in multidisciplinary and international teams.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 27,000/- p.m. plus HRA as applicable
salary_details.details: Rs. 27,000/- p.m. plus HRA as applicable

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Project Associate - I position at IIT Mandi?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Project Associate - I post at IIT Mandi is 15th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate - I role?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B. Tech / M. Sc. / M. A. or equivalent degree in specific disciplines like Civil Engineering, Environmental Engineering, Geography, Sociology, or related fields.

faq.question: Q3. Is there an application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate - I position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 27,000/- per month, plus House Rent Allowance (HRA) as applicable.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Project Associate - I job at IIT Mandi?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted via email. Ensure you attach all required documents and send the email before the deadline.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies for Project Associate - I?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Associate - I position in this recruitment notification.

faq.question: Q7. What are the key responsibilities of a Project Associate - I at IIT Mandi?
faq.answer: Responsibilities include conducting fieldwork, adhering to research protocols, and possessing good communication and teamwork skills.

faq.question: Q8. Does IIT Mandi offer age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Age relaxation details are not explicitly mentioned in the summary, but it is generally applicable as per government norms. Please refer to the official notification for specifics.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for this role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Associate - I position will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and website for IIT Mandi?
faq.answer: The official website is www.iitmandi.ac.in. The official notification PDF link will be provided in the Important Links section.
